inputs.label: Black Hole Mass
inputs.businessContext: Mass of the black hole in solar masses. Typical stellar mass black holes: 5-20 M☉; supermassive: 10^6-10^9 M☉.

inputs.label: Spin Parameter (a/M)
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless spin parameter, from 0 (non-rotating) to 1 (maximal). For astrophysical black holes, typical spin ~0.1-0.998.

inputs.label: Electric Charge (Q/M)
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless charge parameter. Astrophysical black holes are expected to be neutral (0).

inputs.label: Observer Distance from Center
inputs.businessContext: Distance from the black hole center at which to calculate time dilation. Must be greater than event horizon. Default: 10,000 km (e.g., for a stellar black hole).
